# Xtreme Kleen

> Xtreme Kleen (Xtreme Kleen Wash & Rental LLC) is a 5.0-Google-rated exterior cleaning company based in Portland, Texas, serving the Coastal Bend (Portland, Gregory, Ingleside, Aransas Pass, Rockport, Port Aransas, Corpus Christi, Taft, Sinton, Odem) and the Eagle Ford oil patch (Alice, Beeville, Kenedy, Karnes City, Three Rivers, George West, Pleasanton, Cotulla, Freer). Residential, commercial, and industrial. Open 24 hours. Call or text 361-947-7811. Free on-site quotes.

Xtreme Kleen cleans residential, commercial, and industrial exteriors using the
method that fits each surface: soft washing (low-pressure, chemistry-first) for
siding, stucco, and roofs; calibrated pressure washing for concrete; and an
OSHA-aligned safety program (JSA, lockout/tagout, stop-work authority, full PPE)
for industrial plant work such as fin fan / air-cooled heat exchanger cleaning.

The company is owned and run by Eric Kuhn. The person who quotes the job is the
person who does the job — there is no call center and no sales team.

## Services

- [Power & Pressure Washing](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/pressure-washing): Driveways, sidewalks, patios, and commercial concrete — surface cleaners, no etching.
- [Soft Wash Cleaning](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/soft-washing): Low-pressure house and building washing that kills algae and mildew instead of rinsing it.
- [Roof Cleaning](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/roof-cleaning): Black streak (Gloeocapsa magma) removal with no pressure on shingles.
- [Interior & Exterior Window Cleaning](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/window-cleaning): Homes to multi-story commercial, including boom-lift access.
- [Glass & Mirror Cleaning](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/glass-mirror-cleaning): Storefront and showroom glass, one-time or recurring schedules.
- [Industrial & Plant Services](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/industrial-cleaning): Fin fans, heat exchangers, pipe racks, tank exteriors, fleet washing, construction cleanup.
- [Oilfield & Heavy Equipment Washing](https://xtremekleentx.com/services/oilfield-cleaning): Frac tanks, rig equipment, yard iron, and DOT fleets across the Eagle Ford — hot-water degreasing under an OSHA-aligned safety program.

## Service Areas

- [All service areas](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas): Coastal Bend coverage and city pages.
- [Portland, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/portland-tx): Home base — fastest response in the service area.
- [Corpus Christi, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/corpus-christi-tx): Residential, storefront, and refinery-corridor industrial, just across the Harbor Bridge.
- [Gregory, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/gregory-tx): Next town over; residential plus industrial-corridor fleets and equipment.
- [Ingleside, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/ingleside-tx): Bayfront homes and energy-terminal industrial work.
- [Aransas Pass, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/aransas-pass-tx): Working-waterfront homes and storefronts.
- [Rockport, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/rockport-tx): Vacation rentals, coastal homes, live-oak shade mildew.
- [Taft, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/taft-tx): Farm-country dust plus Gulf humidity; houses, driveways, metal buildings.
- [Sinton, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/sinton-tx): San Patricio county seat; downtown storefronts and homes.
- [Odem, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/odem-tx): House washes, driveways, and roof streak removal.
- [Port Aransas, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/port-aransas-tx): Island restaurants, rentals, and docks — Fisherman's Wharf and Grumbles Seafood are existing clients, washed overnight.
- [Alice, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/alice-tx): The oilfield-services hub; equipment yards, fleets, storefronts, and homes.
- [Beeville, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/beeville-tx): Eagle Ford eastern flank — yards, fleets, and county-seat storefronts.
- [Kenedy, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/kenedy-tx): Heart of the Eagle Ford; frac tanks, rig equipment, man camps.
- [Karnes City, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/karnes-city-tx): Routed with Kenedy — Karnes County yards, fleets, and facilities.
- [Three Rivers, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/three-rivers-tx): Refinery corridor; plant-adjacent facilities and Eagle Ford truck routes.
- [George West, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/george-west-tx): US-59/281 crossroads; oilfield fleets plus ranch metal buildings.
- [Pleasanton, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/pleasanton-tx): Eagle Ford western flank — yards, fleets, and commercial.
- [Cotulla, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/cotulla-tx): La Salle County core; mobilized yard washes, man camps, I-35 commercial.
- [Freer, TX](https://xtremekleentx.com/service-areas/freer-tx): Duval County lease equipment; self-contained rigs, routed with Alice.

Outside the Coastal Bend: Xtreme Kleen has run jobs as far as Houston, Dallas,
and Austin, and will travel anywhere in Texas for the right job. Out-of-area work
is quoted over the phone — call 361-947-7811.

## Company Pages

- [About / Meet the Owner](https://xtremekleentx.com/about): Who Eric Kuhn is, how the company works, and the safety program.
- [Our Work](https://xtremekleentx.com/our-work): Real before/after photos, job videos, and the commercial client list — no stock imagery.
- [Reviews](https://xtremekleentx.com/reviews): All Google reviews, verifiable on the public profile.
- [Contact](https://xtremekleentx.com/contact): Call/text 361-947-7811, free on-site quotes.
- [Privacy Policy](https://xtremekleentx.com/privacy) · [Terms of Service](https://xtremekleentx.com/terms)

## Commercial Clients

Xtreme Kleen has done commercial work for Doc's Seafood & Steaks (Corpus Christi),
Grumbles Seafood Co. (Port Aransas), Fisherman's Wharf (Port Aransas), United
Rentals, and Coast Materials Inc. Restaurants and storefronts are typically
cleaned at night so the business never has to close.

## Facts

- Phone: 361-947-7811 (call or text, open 24 hours)
- Email: Xtreme.Kleen2023@gmail.com
- Base: Portland, TX (San Patricio County)
- Owner: Eric Kuhn
- Google rating: 5.0 (5 reviews)
- Quotes: free, done on-site in person — no phone-guess pricing
- Industrial safety: JSA, lockout/tagout, stop-work authority, full PPE; documentation on request
- Travels beyond the Coastal Bend for large jobs (Houston, Dallas, Austin)
